'''Pedna Scotian''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chev]], she flew with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Zsinj]] [[Hunt for Zsinj|campaign]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
According to [[Aaron Allston]]'s website, his backstory on Pedna is that she was a Chevin slave rescued by [[Will Scotian/Legends|Will Scotian]] and adopted his name in honor of her rescuer.<ref name="Allston FAQ">{{WebCite|url=http://www.aaronallston.com/factpages/faq_starwars.html#solo|text=(Aaron Allston's Web Site) FAQ: ''Star Wars'' Novels|author=Aaron Allston|date=2013-01-15|work=AaronAllston.com|archivedate=20121218203710}}</ref>

''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' lists Pedna Scotian as having the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] [[Rogue Two/Legends|Rogue Two]] during her service with Rogue Squadron. However, the novel ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' identifies Scotian as being Rogue Three.
